title: factorial
goal: Create src/factorial.mjs exporting function factorial(n) returning n! for integer n >= 0, and throwing a RangeError for negative or non-integer n.
notes: Golden must stress: 0! === 1, a small n (e.g. 5 -> 120), and that a negative and a non-integer both throw (assert.throws). Visible can test only 5 -> 120.
